# hubspot Provider

Free alpha of an OpenTofu-first provider for HubSpot CRM property configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    hubspot = {
      source  = "registry.opentofu.org/jackemcpherson/hubspot"
      version = "= 0.1.0-alpha.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "hubspot" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) HubSpot static app access token. Prefer the `HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `api_base_url` (String) Advanced absolute API origin override for testing. Defaults to `https://api.hubapi.com`.
